creator: edwin@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

This is not a bug report, this is an user question. 

Please ask this question on one of the following mailinglists: 

- freebsd-questions@freebsd.org 
- freebsd-stable@freebsd.org 

Don't forget to include the output of a traceroute towards 
www.freebsd.org when you mail the question.
